issue_device_control_instructions.title: Issue Device Control Instructions
issue_device_control_instructions.description: Issue control instructions to the specified SN device; different device types support different instructions, see the interface parameter description for details

request_header.note: Standard HMAC-signed headers (accessKey, timestamp, nonce, sign, Authorization)

request_parameters.name: deviceControlMap
request_parameters.description: Key for deviceControlMap is SN (e.g. '318*********14'). The set of instructions to be issued.

request_parameters.name: <controlId>
request_parameters.description: Instruction ID. Different models of devices support different instructions, please refer to Appendix 1 for details.

request_parameters.name: <value>
request_parameters.description: Value corresponding to the instruction, please refer to Appendix 1 for details.

return_parameters.name: code
return_parameters.description: Request error code, non-zero means error

query_results_of_device_control_instruct.title: Query Results of Device Control Instructions
query_results_of_device_control_instruct.description: Query the execution results of a specific SN device for a specific issued instruction based on the traceId returned by the device control instruction

request_parameters.name: traceId
request_parameters.description: The operation trace ID returned by issuing the device control instruction

return_parameters.name: code
return_parameters.description: Request error code, non-zero means error

instructions.description: VPP business usage. FCAS toggling. Enables or disables the function of switch frequency control.

For VPP (Virtual Power Plant), set the real-time charge/discharge/stop operations. charge: Battery charges using PV first, and any shortfall is drawn from the grid (Unit: W). discharge: Battery discharges to cover household consumption first, then excess is injected into the grid (Unit: W). stop: Battery neither charges nor discharges. hold: MaxPV generates power as much as possible and battery neither charges nor discharges.
Battery neither charges nor discharges. Ideally, the hybrid storage and charging system operates for self-consumption.
Battery charges using PV first, and any shortfall is drawn from the grid (Unit: W).
Battery discharges to cover household consumption first, then excess is injected into the grid (Unit: W).
Self-consumption: Battery only to meet household demand. Balance: should not charge the battery to more energy than stored in the storage system.
